title: Luffy on Amazon Lily: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They do not interfere with this island,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just who do you think you are...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Former- former-former empress of Amazon Lily, Gloriosa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if this country is destroyed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And then you shamelessly came back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Thank you!! So you'll go for us!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: just kidding. Don't get carried away.
